headline: Stryker Restores Systems After Cyberattack As Investors Weigh Valuation And Resilience
summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) reports that all systems are fully restored after a significant cyberattack disrupted manufacturing, ordering, and shipping. The incident caused a material disruption to operations and is expected to affect Q1 results. The company indicates no material impact to full year guidance following the recovery. Stryker, a major medtech player across orthopaedics, surgical equipment, and hospital products, operates in a sector where reliability and uptime are critical for...
